ques: Summarize all the payment plans and their advantages in huggingface pricing.
answer: HuggingFace pricing has 3 subscription plans plus usage-based options. (1) **PRO — $9/mo**: personal boost — 10× private/2× public storage, 20× inference credits, 8× ZeroGPU quota + priority, Spaces Dev Mode, blog publishing, private Dataset Viewer, PRO badge. (2) **Team — $20/mo per user** (most popular): for orgs — SSO (SAML/OIDC), Storage Regions, Audit Logs, Resource Groups, Analytics, advanced auth/token controls, plus PRO benefits for all members. (3) **Enterprise — $50/mo per user**: all Team features plus highest limits, SCIM provisioning, advanced security, managed/annual billing, compliance processes, and dedicated support. Additionally: Storage at $8–12/TB/mo (egress/CDN included), Spaces GPU hardware on-demand starting at $0 (free CPU/ZeroGPU tiers), and dedicated Inference Endpoints from $0.033/hour.
